parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: $('Parse Scan').first().json.shouldEscalate ? 'm.text' : 'm.notice', body: $('Parse Scan').first().json.matrixBody, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: $('Parse Scan').first().json.matrixHtml }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ project: { id: '0-12' }, summary: $('Parse Scan').first().json.ytSummary, description: $('Parse Scan').first().json.ytDesc }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: '📋 Created ' + $('Register Issue').first().json.registeredIssueId + ' for security findings on ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.targetDns, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '📋 Created ' + $('Register Issue').first().json.registeredIssueId + ' for security findings on ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.targetDns + '' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.text', body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: ./skills/security-triage/security-triage.sh ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.target + ' "' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.ytSummary.replace('Security: ', '').split(' on ')[0] + '" ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.highestSev + ' ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.scanner, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: ./skills/security-triage/security-triage.sh ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.target + ' "' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.ytSummary.replace('Security: ', '').split(' on ')[0] + '" ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.highestSev + ' ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.scanner + '', 'm.mentions': { user_ids: ['@openclaw:matrix.example.net'] } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ issues: [{ idReadable: $('Parse Scan').first().json.existingIssueId }], query: 'state Open' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: 'Security scan detected findings again while issue was in To Verify state. Moving back to Open.

Finding: ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.ytSummary + '
Severity: ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.highestSev + '
Time: ' + new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.command:
=LOCK_DIR="/tmp/sec-triage-lock-{{ $('Parse Scan').first().json.target }}"
if mkdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "PROCEED"
  (sleep 300 && rmdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null) </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1 &
else
  echo "LOCKED"
fi

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ "org.matrix.msc3381.poll.start": { "kind": "org.matrix.msc3381.poll.disclosed", "max_selections": 1, "question": { "org.matrix.msc1767.text": "[Baseline] New finding: " + $("Parse Scan").first().json.pollPort + " on " + $("Parse Scan").first().json.pollTarget + " (" + $("Parse Scan").first().json.pollFinding + "). Was this an intentional deployment?" }, "answers": [ { "id": "add_baseline", "org.matrix.msc1767.text": "Yes, I deployed this \u2014 add port " + $("Parse Scan").first().json.pollPort + " to scanner baseline on " + $("Parse Scan").first().json.pollScanner }, { "id": "investigate", "org.matrix.msc1767.text": "No, this is unexpected \u2014 keep investigating" }, { "id": "escalate", "org.matrix.msc1767.text": "Not sure \u2014 escalate to Claude Code for deep analysis" } ] }, "org.matrix.msc1767.text": "[Baseline] New finding: " + $("Parse Scan").first().json.pollPort + " on " + $("Parse Scan").first().json.pollTarget + ". Was this intentional? (1) Add to baseline (2) Investigate (3) Escalate" }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: $('Parse Scan').first().json.shouldEscalate ? 'm.text' : 'm.notice', body: $('Parse Scan').first().json.matrixBody, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: $('Parse Scan').first().json.matrixHtml }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ project: { id: '0-12' }, summary: $('Parse Scan').first().json.ytSummary, description: $('Parse Scan').first().json.ytDesc }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: '📋 Created ' + $('Register Issue').first().json.registeredIssueId + ' for security findings on ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.targetDns, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '📋 Created ' + $('Register Issue').first().json.registeredIssueId + ' for security findings on ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.targetDns + '' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.text', body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: ./skills/security-triage/security-triage.sh ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.target + ' "' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.ytSummary.replace('Security: ', '').split(' on ')[0] + '" ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.highestSev + ' ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.scanner, format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '@openclaw use the exec tool to run: ./skills/security-triage/security-triage.sh ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.target + ' "' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.ytSummary.replace('Security: ', '').split(' on ')[0] + '" ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.highestSev + ' ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.scanner + '', 'm.mentions': { user_ids: ['@openclaw:matrix.example.net'] } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ issues: [{ idReadable: $('Parse Scan').first().json.existingIssueId }], query: 'state Open' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: 'Security scan detected findings again while issue was in To Verify state. Moving back to Open.

Finding: ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.ytSummary + '
Severity: ' + $('Parse Scan').first().json.highestSev + '
Time: ' + new Date().toISOString() }) }}

if mkdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "PROCEED"

else
  echo "LOCKED"
fi
